existing_features.title: Redesign the AP monogram logo in the Hero section with an improved background — use a rich, earthy or premium color (e.g., deep green, warm amber, or coffee brown) as the logo background shape, with high-contrast lettering. Ensure the logo mark feels polished and brand-appropriate for an agricultural/dairy business.

Update the hero section's company name, tagline, and any supporting text to use a clearly visible, high-contrast font color that reads well over the hero background image. Prefer warm white, cream, or a light earthy tone rather than the default theme foreground.

Apply overall design polish across the site: ensure color consistency between the logo, hero, navbar, and section headings using the established earthy/agri palette; tighten spacing and typography hierarchy in the Hero section; and make sure CTA buttons have sufficient contrast and hover states that align with the refined logo and color scheme.
